items.title: Giant collection of 4th of July iOS app deals now live
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best iOS game and app deals is now ready to roll, and we have a sizable collection to browse through ahead of July 4th. Highlights include World’s End Club, MuseDash, Warm Snow, The Curse of Issyos, Cosmic Express, Dune: Imperium, A Monster’s Expedition, Streets of Rage 4, and more. We still have an all-time low waiting on Apple’s AirTag 2 4-pack,  M5 iPad Pro deals at up to $350 off, AirPods 4 at nearly 25% off, and the most affordable 13-inch M4 iPad Air at $200 off. The 4th of July app deals await below.

items.title: Let freedom roll on Lectric’s XP4 utility e-bikes + up to $473 in FREE gear from $999 for July 4th, more from $799
items.summary: Lectric has switched gears on its Better-than-Prime to its 4th of July e-bike Sale that is offering up to $694 in continuing savings on bundles. One of the models seeing increased savings, and comes as my favorite pick from the brand, is the XP4 750 Long-Range Utility e-bikes with $473 in FREE gear at $1,299 shipped, while the standard XP4 e-bikes get a $79 bundle at $999 shipped. These bundles are down from the $1,772 and $1,078 prices you’d be paying if the packages weren’t included for free, with the long-range models getting $49 more value than during Prime Day. You’ll be getting a LevelUp rack for the standard e-bikes, while the 750 models also get a suspension seat post, Elite headlight upgrade, a pair of mirrors, an accordion-style bike lock, a phone mount, and water-resistant pannier bags. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last – plus, get my in-depth take on this e-bike from my hands-on review.

items.title: EcoFlow flash sale drops the 2x 1,024Wh DELTA 3 Plus power station bundle to new $1,149 low, more from $1,279
items.summary: As part of EcoFlow’s extended Prime Day Sale, the brand is offering one final flash sale running until the end of the overall sale with up to 42% savings on two power station units, an AC/heater bundle, and 2x DELTA Pro Ultra extra batteries bundle. Among the two power station options, things start with 2x DELTA 3 Plus Portable Power Stations together for $1,149 shipped (automatically discounted in your cart), which currently beats out Amazon’s pricing by $189. Normally, this bundle goes for $1,598 at full price, which we’ve seen taken down as low as $1,159 until now. Not only that, but a single of these power stations were seen dropping to a new $569 low during Prime Day, which this bundle only lands $11 above. All-in-all, this is a $449 markdown to a new all-time low price. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.
